services.name: Hospital Punta Pacífica (Johns Hopkins affiliated)
services.address: Boulevard Pacífica y Vía Punta Darién, Panama City
services.notes: Top private hospital, Johns Hopkins International affiliate, English-speaking staff

services.name: Farmacias Arrocha - Calle 50
services.notes: Major pharmacy chain, wide stock, some US brands, English spoken

services.name: Riba Smith Bella Vista
services.notes: Upscale supermarket popular with expats, imported US/European products

services.name: Banco General - Calle 50
services.notes: Largest private bank in Panama, English-speaking staff, expat accounts

services.name: Centro Médico Paitilla
services.address: Avenida Balboa y Calle 53, Paitilla, Panama City
services.notes: Large private medical center, English-speaking doctors, walk-in and appointments

services.name: Dental Studio Panama
services.address: Torre Médica, Punta Pacífica, Panama City
services.notes: Modern dental clinic, English-speaking, dental tourism pricing

services.name: Pet Center Veterinary Hospital
services.address: Vía España, El Cangrejo, Panama City
services.notes: Full-service vet hospital, emergency care, English-speaking vets

services.name: Parque Omar
services.address: Vía Porras, San Francisco, Panama City
services.notes: Large urban park with walking trails, popular with dog owners, open green spaces

services.name: PowerClub Panama
services.notes: Premium gym chain, pools, group classes, modern equipment

services.name: Balboa Union Church
services.notes: English-language non-denominational church, historic former Canal Zone congregation

services.name: American Society of Panama
services.notes: Expat community center, social events, cultural activities, newcomer welcome

services.name: Aeropuerto Internacional de Tocumen (PTY)
services.notes: Major hub for Copa Airlines, direct flights to US, Europe, Latin America

services.name: Estación del Metro Albrook
services.notes: Metro Line 1 terminal, connected to Albrook bus terminal (largest in Latin America)

services.name: Selina Cowork Casco Viejo
services.notes: Coworking in historic quarter, day passes, fast WiFi, community events

services.name: Pet Spa Panama
services.notes: Dog grooming and spa services, pickup available

services.name: Doggy Daycare Panama
services.notes: Dog daycare and boarding, outdoor play areas, expat-owned

attractions.name: Casco Viejo (Casco Antiguo)
attractions.description: UNESCO World Heritage colonial quarter with plazas, churches, restaurants, and rooftop bars
attractions.frequency: Open 24/7, guided walking tours available daily

attractions.name: BioMuseo (Museo de la Biodiversidad)
attractions.description: Frank Gehry-designed museum showcasing Panama's natural history and biodiversity

attractions.name: Parque Nacional Soberanía
attractions.description: Rainforest national park, Pipeline Road for world-class birdwatching
attractions.frequency: Day trip, open daily, best early morning for wildlife

attractions.name: Panama Canal Miraflores Locks Visitor Center
attractions.description: Watch ships transit the canal, museum with interactive exhibits and observation deck

attractions.name: Amador Causeway
attractions.description: Scenic road linking three islands, cycling, walking, views of skyline and canal

attractions.name: Mercado de Mariscos
attractions.description: Waterfront fish market with upstairs restaurant, fresh ceviche and seafood

attractions.name: Multiplaza Pacific Mall
attractions.description: Upscale shopping mall with international brands, cinema, dining

attractions.name: Calle Uruguay Nightlife District
attractions.description: Popular street with bars, restaurants, and nightclubs in Bella Vista

attractions.name: Isla Contadora (Pearl Islands)
attractions.description: Tropical island getaway with pristine beaches, 20 min flight from city

attractions.name: Iglesia de San José (Golden Altar)
attractions.description: 17th-century church in Casco Viejo famous for its ornate gold-leaf baroque altar
attractions.frequency: Open for visits daily, active parish
